response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive experience as a Senior Full Stack Developer with over 15 years in the industry, including roles at multiple companies where he contributed to scalable systems, AI-agent infrastructure, and developer tooling. His expertise spans multiple programming languages (TypeScript, Java, Kotlin, D, C++, etc.), cloud platforms, and testing frameworks, with a strong focus on clean, testable code and user experience. His open-source contributions and leadership in workshops further validate his technical depth and collaborative skills, aligning well with the role's requirements.
strengths: Deep expertise in full-stack development with TypeScript, Node.js, and React, matching the primary stack requirements.
Proven experience in AI-agent infrastructure and scalable backend services, including MCP and Kubernetes deployments.
Strong background in testing frameworks (Vitest, Jest) and dev-ops practices (CI/CD, Docker, GitLab), with a focus on quality and reliability.
concerns: Limited direct experience with Nest.js, a primary requirement in the role, though his Node.js proficiency suggests adaptability.
Career gap from October 2025 to present, which may require further clarification during the interview.
Primary technologies listed do not include Kotlin/Java (secondary stack), though he has experience with Java and C#.

key_factors.factor: AI agent infrastructure and cloud-native development
